hero.title: Fullstack Developer
hero.tagline: Building systems that scale. Clean architecture, clear code.

about.label: Message
about.headline: I care about **craft** and **impact**—what we build and how it holds up. Quality code, clear architecture, systems that **scale**.
about.body: I focus on clean architecture, SOLID principles, and maintainable software. TypeScript, React, Node.js—and systems that last. I like to ship, iterate, and leave codebases better than I found them.

exp0.h1: Developed and maintained scalable web applications using Laravel, Vue.js, and Node.js (NestJS), delivering high-performance solutions with clean, modular architectures designed for long-term maintainability.
exp0.h2: Designed and integrated secure RESTful APIs with advanced data handling and validation, applying SOLID principles, Object Calisthenics, and design patterns to ensure robust and extensible backend systems.
exp0.h3: Implemented JWT-based authentication and secure session management, strengthening application security and protecting sensitive user data across services.
exp0.h4: Leveraged TypeScript to build strongly typed backend modules, reducing runtime errors and improving system reliability, developer productivity, and code consistency.
exp0.h5: Improved code quality through peer code reviews and systematic refactoring, enhancing performance, readability, and long-term maintainability of critical components.
exp0.h6: Established automated testing and CI/CD practices, implementing unit and end-to-end tests with Jest and Detox and integrating deployment pipelines to accelerate delivery and ensure stable releases for web and mobile applications.

exp1.h1: Implemented a scalable Stripe payment integration, enabling reliable transaction processing and increasing the application's payment throughput and operational efficiency.
exp1.h2: Designed and delivered a secure authentication system supporting email login and third-party providers (Microsoft and Google), strengthening account security and improving user onboarding flexibility.
exp1.h3: Built a robust identity and access layer using PostgreSQL, incorporating secure password hashing, two-factor authentication (2FA), and password recovery mechanisms to enhance platform security and compliance.
exp1.h4: Developed full OAuth integration for external services, enabling seamless third-party authentication and expanding the platform's ecosystem connectivity.
exp1.h5: Optimized frontend containerization using advanced multi-stage Docker builds, reducing image size from 1.9GB to ~210MB, significantly accelerating build times, deployment speed, and infrastructure efficiency.

exp2.h1: Architected and launched the initial technical foundation of a social networking platform, designing a scalable full-stack architecture to support future growth and high user interaction.
exp2.h2: Developed a highly responsive landing page with fluid animations, optimizing cross-device performance and significantly improving user experience and first-touch engagement.
exp2.h3: Implemented an interaction-based recommendation algorithm that analyzed user activity and liked posts to surface relevant content, increasing user engagement and content discovery.
exp2.h4: Enforced TypeScript across the entire codebase and applied SOLID principles with dependency injection, creating a modular, maintainable backend architecture that accelerated feature development and reduced technical debt.
exp2.h5: Leveraged Next.js for the frontend layer, improving performance, SEO readiness, and secure communication between frontend and backend services.
exp2.h6: Provided technical leadership across multiple national and international projects, contributing to architecture decisions, mentoring developers, and coordinating implementations to deliver scalable solutions aligned with business objectives.

exp3.h1: Led the 15-month migration of a legacy dashboard (Nepal) to React, revitalizing an abandoned codebase by refactoring the frontend architecture and establishing a scalable, maintainable structure for long-term development.
exp3.h2: Introduced TypeScript across the codebase to improve type safety and reliability, reducing runtime errors and production bugs while improving developer productivity and maintainability.
exp3.h3: Modernized the state management layer by redesigning Redux actions and updating deprecated libraries, enabling adoption of modern React features and improving overall application performance and stability.
exp3.h4: Optimized containerization by redesigning the Docker image, reducing image size by ~60% and significantly improving build efficiency and deployment speed.
exp3.h5: Implemented automated deployment pipelines using Kubernetes, increasing environment reliability and accelerating the release cycle for faster and more consistent delivery.

project0.description: Authentication API with AES implementation focused on performance and security.
